title: Croatian-Style Cheesecake Knafeh
description: A unique dessert that combines the flaky, buttery crust of a brioche with the creamy, cheesy goodness of knafeh, a traditional Middle Eastern dessert, adding a touch of Croatian flair.

ingredients.name: Fermented cream
ingredients.notes: such as sour cream or buttermilk

instructions: Roll out brioche dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Cut out circles of dough to fit 6-8 ramekins or small cups.
Place a circle of dough into each ramekin, pressing it into the bottom and up the sides.
In a separate bowl, mix together knafeh cheese, fermented cream, and granulated sugar.
Spoon the cheese mixture into each ramekin, filling to the top.
Dot the top of each ramekin with melted butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
